children.heading: Application for waiver
children.label: a Application for waiver
children.text: Any covered person subject to and any State subject to section 13257() of this title may petition the Secretary for a waiver of the applicable requirements of section 13251 or 13257() of this title.section 13251 of this titleoo

children.label: A
children.text: the reduction in consumption of petroleum that would result from 100 percent cumulative compliance with the fuel use requirements of ; orsection 13251 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of an entity covered under section 13257() of this title, a reduction equal to the annual consumption by the State entity of alternative fuels if all of the cumulative alternative fuel vehicles of the State entity given credit under were to use alternative fuel 100 percent of the time; andosection 13258 of this title
is in compliance with all applicable vehicle emission standards established by the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency under the Clean Air Act ( et seq.).42 U.S.C. 7401
certifies the quantity of the petroleum motor fuel reduction of the State or covered person during the preceding model year; and
projects the baseline quantity of the petroleum motor fuel reduction of the State or covered person during the following model year.
may impose on the State or covered person a penalty under .section 13262 of this title
